Orient with /slice, capture erratic work with /backlog, refresh with /sync, bootstrap with /init, fan out concurrent sessions with /fanout.

entries.title: hmd
entries.description: Nothing ships unproven. Heimdall is an autonomous multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code that turns one prompt into a finished project — and keeps moving the bar on what counts as done: every plan wires an external, falsifiable oracle so the implementation can never grade its own homework, and the merge stays blocked until the work is proven correct. Decomposes work, spawns parallel agents, enforces quality gates with CTO-level judgment. Live observability via a terminal-native HUD statusline and end-of-run summary card.

Coverage, where-was-I recall, token/cost (incl. the cache reveal), trends, how-you-work, ranked open threads, decisions, languages, per-session friction/satisfaction/outcome, and a synthesized narrative read. Across your full history and every machine you code on. Personal by default; optionally keep chosen sources or repos local-only. No telemetry, all local. MCP-agnostic decisions overlay.

entries.title: claude-skills
entries.description: Personal user-scope Claude Code skills. PKI/ops runbooks: internal-ca (2-tier PKI bootstrap with Vault, OCSP, CRL, Ansible deploy), mtls (server-trusts-client mutual TLS on top of internal-ca), lxd-claude-setup (provision Claude Code on a headless LXD/Linux server). Bare-metal Kubernetes family: k8s-bare-metal (kubeadm + Calico + Longhorn + Rancher, single-node/HA/join, checkpoint-resume), harbor-registry (private Harbor registry with self-signed CA), cicd-platform (Argo CD + self-hosted GitHub Actions runners). MJBL mTLS platform suite (the live deployed ecosystem on this host, indexing the /home/mjbl/* runbooks as source-of-truth): mjbl-mtls-platform, mjbl-ca-operations, mjbl-enrollment-plane, mjbl-client-provisioning, mjbl-cert-lifecycle, mjbl-operator-portal, mjbl-mtls-troubleshooting. Slash commands: /k8s-setup, /harbor-setup, /cicd-setup, and the MJBL suite under /mjbl:mtls:* (platform, ca, enroll, client, cert, portal, troubleshoot, issue-server). MJBL Kubernetes estate suite (the live multi-cluster topology — production rkek8s, the facility/ArgoCD cluster, UAT, and DR — kubeconfigs, MetalLB, ArgoCD external-cluster deploys, and the kubectl-apply DR tooling): mjbl-k8s-platform, mjbl-k8s-production, mjbl-k8s-facility, mjbl-k8s-dr, under /mjbl:k8s:* (platform, prod, facility, dr).

entries.title: tiered-development
entries.description: Multi-tier model delegation for Claude Code: the Opus coordinator brainstorms a rough plan with you, then chooses the model tier for each slice (or a Sonnet composer picks) — Opus/Fable architects refine and review, Opus builders write substantive code, Sonnet handles mechanical edits/research/verification, and Haiku the menial work. Fable is the premium tier, spent sparingly. A fresh agent per task, each with a clean context. Ships six agents, a gated coordination skill, and three helper workflows (design-panel, execute-wave, review-panel).

entries.title: tms-pipeline

entries.title: creatorwood-sushidata-gtm
entries.description: Sushidata is a context data lake for long-term AI memory. This plugin turns Claude into a Sushidata-native agent: ingest community signals from Discord, Slack, and forums; run GTM prospecting and outbound with HeyReach, Hunter, and Apify; build competitor battlecards for PMMs; analyze campaign performance with research swarms; discover ICP signals from won/lost account data; and generate personalized outreach copy. Every finding is saved to the Sushidata context lake so future sessions have full memory of what was learned.

Grounded in the persona at cto-persona.md; frameworks load on demand via frameworks/INDEX.md; prescribes first-party tools instead of rebuilding them (ecosystem-tools.md).

entries.title: config-lsp
entries.description: Language Server Protocol configuration for Claude Code

entries.title: agent-kevin
entries.description: Portable, file-based personal AI assistant. Compiles raw sessions into a queryable wiki, manages tasks across project lifecycles, drives SEO/web tools (GSC, PageSpeed, SerpAPI, headless browser, web search), and ships 20+ skills covering onboarding, daily/weekly/monthly cadences, audits, and content workflows. All data stays as local markdown + YAML.

entries.title: caret
entries.description: Review, annotate, and approve Claude Code plans in a local web UI.

entries.title: build-loop
entries.description: Multi-phase build orchestration with native debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Native debug-loop, debugging-memory, and logging-tracer skills provide root-cause investigation without a bundled MCP server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; the logging-tracer skill includes an optional Coding Debugger escalation hop to the standalone supporting plugin for extended capability.

entries.title: bd
entries.description: Brilliant Directories integration. Manage members, posts, leads, reviews, web pages, redirects, email templates, forms, menus, tags, widgets, and post-type configurations on any Brilliant Directories website via the public hosted MCP at brilliantmcp.com. Bundles growth-automation skills (/bd:events researches local events and creates SEO-rich event posts; more skills coming).

entries.title: camunda-migration
entries.description: Claude Code skills for migrating Camunda 7 projects to Camunda 8

entries.title: distillery
entries.description: Knowledge base skills for Claude Code — capture, search, and synthesize project knowledge

entries.title: recoup-skills
entries.description: A record label in a box. Recoup turns your AI agent into a full music team — artist research and analytics, content and short-form video, song analysis, release campaigns, and catalog valuation — all in one install.

entries.title: rawgentic
entries.description: 6 SDLC workflow skills + 6 workspace management + 1 planning skill + 2 security skills + hooks for Claude Code: project registration, setup, session binding, requirements interviewing, issue creation, feature implementation, bug fixing, adversarial review, incident response, peer consultation, whole-tree security scanning, security pattern syncing, opt-in operating-charter installation, session-registry housekeeping, and dangerous pattern blocking with per-project exceptions.

entries.title: apple-numbers
entries.description: Read and write Apple Numbers spreadsheets - read tables, create files, update cells, manage sheets/tables, search, import CSV/TSV/JSON, and export data (macOS only)

entries.title: stdd
entries.description: Spec and test driven development for Claude Code. Enforces spec-first, one-test-at-a-time TDD via slash commands, a PreToolUse guard hook, a git pre-commit gate, and a Stop-hook coverage audit.

entries.title: kronael
entries.description: Installer for the Kronael toolkit. Trigger by saying 'install kronael', 'install kronael tools', or running /kronael:install. Deploys language patterns (go/py/rs/ts/sql), workflow commands (commit, ship, refine, diary), wisdom skill, and lifecycle hooks (compaction preservation, prompt nudges, stop checks) into ~/.claude/.

entries.title: hyperframes
entries.description: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entries.title: pinpoint
entries.description: Visual annotation for AI coding agents — screenshot anything, annotate regions, get structured feedback

entries.title: skillbooks
entries.description: AI-executed skills for logged-in site access (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Reddit, Airbnb, Otter, and more), travel and award search, editorial review, and source-cited research.

entries.title: chrisbanes-skills
entries.description: Skills for Kotlin, Android, JVM, and Jetpack Compose development by Chris Banes.

entries.title: ui-ux-pro-max
entries.description: UI/UX design intelligence. 84 styles, 161 palettes, 73 font pairings, 25 charts, 17 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Nuxt.js, Nuxt UI, Svelte, Astro, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui, Jetpack Compose, Angular, Laravel, JavaFX, Three.js). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient.

entries.title: dmj
entries.description: Divya's parallel-first agentic engineering skills: team-based workflows, adversarial verification, security and performance gates from line 1

entries.title: honestweek
entries.description: Honest, git-verified, private-by-default weekly work summaries from your AI coding sessions.

entries.title: tk
entries.description: SoT gap, route, reflect, learn, ui-diff와 grill/prototype/merge-conflict/handoff/to-prd/to-issues/arch-review를 제공하는 TigerKit Claude Code 플러그인입니다.

entries.title: nx-plugin-for-aws
entries.description: Scaffold and build cloud-native applications on AWS using @aws/nx-plugin generators. Covers workspace creation, project scaffolding with TypeScript, Python, React, CDK, Terraform, and more.

entries.title: adr
entries.description: Complete lifecycle management for Architectural Decision Records (ADRs): create, update, supersede, search, audit compliance, and export

entries.title: token-usage
entries.description: Attribute Claude Code and Cowork token usage to the work that consumed it — per-command, per-skill, per-agent and per-model breakdowns, cross-session history, live session ledger, and cost estimates

entries.title: research-plans
entries.description: Plan-based AI research workflows for social science: a lightweight master plan with a status tracker, versioned execution plans per component, an append-only decision log, a plan-quality rubric, and a browser board for review, annotation, and progress tracking.

entries.description: Development agents, skills, hooks, and commands for Claude Code workflows

entries.title: kratos
entries.description: Multi-agent orchestrator for features, research, and project insights

entries.title: forkmind
entries.description: Local-first LLM branching, debugging & context offloading. Treat AI context windows like a Git repo — capture, branch, regression-test LLM calls as a DAG, and archive context as encrypted, restorable capsules. Teaches Claude when and how to drive ForkMind.

entries.title: harness-mem
entries.description: Persistent memory system for AI coding sessions — cross-tool memory sharing with 6-dimensional hybrid search

entries.title: prompt-builder
entries.description: Classify, diagnose, rewrite, and score prompts by model tier and deployment

entries.title: trading-desk
entries.description: TradingDesk — a Multi-Agent LLM Financial Trading Framework for agentic coding CLIs (GitHub Copilot CLI, Claude Code, Codex). A re-implementation of TauricResearch/TradingAgents' multi-agent architecture and prompts: a team of specialized analyst, researcher, trader, and risk-management agents that debate and produce a grounded trade decision (Buy/Overweight/Hold/Underweight/Sell). Uses its own data sources and models. Research only — not financial advice.

entries.title: shiny-maui-shell
entries.description: Claude Code plugin for Shiny MAUI Shell - enhanced .NET MAUI Shell navigation with ViewModel lifecycle management, source generation, and strong-typed navigation

entries.title: rauf
entries.description: Authoring, review, guidance, and loop-operation skills for rauf autonomous coding loops. rauf owns the backlog contract; these skills serve both the repo-wide ad-hoc flow and feature-pipeline tools that delegate to them.

entries.title: arc42-toolkit
entries.description: Provider-agnostic AI skills for creating professional arc42 software architecture documentation. Covers all 12 arc42 sections, cross-section quality review, and automated consistency linting.

entries.title: ai-handoff
entries.description: Automatic, integrity-checked handoff and verified memory recall between Claude Code and Codex.

entries.title: fno
entries.description: Set a target. Say f[no] to mostly done.

entries.title: grepr
entries.description: Skills for managing Grepr jobs and pipelines, building grok parsers, querying log data, and debugging log reduction. Requires the Grepr CLI (npm install -g @grepr/cli).

entries.title: superloopy
entries.description: Lightweight loop harness with strict evidence gates — Claude Code edition.

entries.title: wax-skills
entries.description: Agent skills for Wax design-system analysis, registry authoring, and CLI workflows

entries.title: cinematic-scroll
entries.description: Build cinematic, scroll-driven websites — pinned chapter reveals, multi-depth parallax, 3D tilt, environment-morphing backgrounds, and full release/launch pages. The motion grammar is the skill; the aesthetic is always the user's. Single self-contained scroll sections (Mode A) or a full Next.js release site with GSAP/Lenis + AI-generated visuals (Mode B), via a 5-phase gated pipeline with taste guardrails, 12 scroll patterns, and a transform/opacity performance budget.

entries.title: mindpowers
entries.description: One loop for knowledge work: shape, draft, review, remember. Mindstorming (formerly brainstorming) refines rough ideas into locked specs through Socratic dialogue; drafting turns locked specs into deliverables; reviewing-docs checks any doc against the template's standards; calibrating remembers what you like for next time. Templates cover business reviews, decision docs, PRDs, briefing docs, comms drafts, frameworks, talking points, and post-mortems.

entries.title: rails-upgrade
entries.description: Plan and execute Rails version upgrades following FastRuby.io methodology

entries.title: navgator
entries.description: Map dependencies and analyze blast radius before changing code

entries.title: elixir-phoenix-guide
entries.description: Essential Elixir and Phoenix LiveView development guide with enforced skills, hooks, and patterns for idiomatic code

entries.title: pdd
entries.description: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados com paridade comportamental rastreável: evidência objetiva (score de confiança + harness de comparação), testes de caracterização, QA como portão de merge, PR-dossiê e painel de progresso.

entries.title: beads-superpowers
entries.description: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 6 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entries.title: juggle
entries.description: Multi-topic conversation orchestrator. Manage parallel conversation threads within a single Claude Code session — discuss one topic while background agents research or build for others.

entries.title: open-agent-hub
entries.description: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entries.title: networked-thinking-skills
entries.description: Agent Skills for Networked Thinking atomic notes in Obsidian vaults.

entries.title: y2
entries.description: A minimal Claude plugin written in Python that implements hook handlers and logs all hook invocations.

entries.title: agentic-os
entries.description: Self-improving agent memory system with 9 skills (session lifecycle, memory management, knowledge sync, policy-gated self-improve) and 6 hooks, including a PreToolUse shell circuit breaker. Identity growth via gated candidate queues; scaling thresholds live in one SSoT script. MCP-Tool-Bridge Policy enforces clear roles (tool/introspection/knowledge) and hard no-gos against MCP-as-truth or cross-project mutation.

entries.title: overcast
entries.description: Give any agent senses (video/audio/image understanding) and OSINT reach (search/capture/monitor), organized around an investigation case. Built on pi with the tinycloud/Cloudglue perception backend.

entries.title: zed
entries.description: Personal Claude Code plugin with custom skills, agents, and tools.

entries.title: wicked-testing
entries.description: Standalone QE library — skills-only, 47 skills installed from skills/ directory. 5 Tier-1 orchestrators for user invocation; 40 specialist skills dispatched internally via context:fork.

entries.title: seo-kit
entries.description: Real-data SEO + GEO (LLM answer-engine citation) audit toolkit: point it at a URL for a prioritized punch list; free Tier-0 core, paid tiers opt-in.

entries.title: devpowers
entries.description: Developer productivity skills: GitHub Actions runner and checker, PR/CI status checker, Jira setup and ticket creator, git commit helper, markdown shortener, local/remote Docker debuggers, MCP server setup, and an e2e UI screenshot report generator.

entries.title: claude-github-tools
entries.description: GitHub workflow skills for Claude Code - issue creation, PR review triage, backlog summaries/quick-wins, and GitHub Actions authoring.

entries.title: ai-pm-assistant
entries.description: Senior PM co-pilot - converts raw inputs into decision-ready PM artefacts across the full delivery lifecycle

entries.title: ai-config
entries.description: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entries.title: claude-cost-optimizer
entries.description: Cost-conscious mode for Claude Code. Saves 30-60% on costs through concise responses, model routing, and efficient workflow patterns.

entries.title: aryaxt-skills
entries.description: Aryan's shared Claude Code skills — iOS dev (simulator/device/testflight), web dev (chrome), Firebase debugging, ship workflows, and decision tooling. Project-specific values come from each project's scripts/ios-config.sh.

entries.title: claude-dev-skills
entries.description: Personal dev skills: git workflows, code review, project setup, productivity

entries.title: hero-skills
entries.description: AI Hero agent patterns and workflows for consulting and development

entries.title: cowork-to-code-bridge
entries.description: Connect Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your own computer (macOS or Linux). Cowork hands a task to a local Claude Code agent (and can run approved scripts too); the bridge is idempotent, streams progress, and is token-protected. Install with one command; it sets up a global Cowork skill so every session connects automatically — no /plugin, no setup inside Cowork.

entries.title: river-review
entries.description: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.
